chapter_title.ar: باب الزَّكَاةِ لَا تُعْطَى غَيْرَ أَهْلِ الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – The Zakāt cannot be given to other than the people of Al-Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/84)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (6/84)
text: إِنَّ الصَّدَقَةَ وَ الزَّكَاةَ لَا يُحَابَى بِهَا قَرِيبٌ وَ لَمْ يُمْنَعْهَا بَعِيدٌ .

en.hubeali: Hammad Bin Isa, from hareyz, from Zurara and Muhammad Bin Muslim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The charity and the Zakāt, cannot be gifted to the near ones, and would not be prevented to the remote ones’.
en.sarwar: 3. Hammad ibn ‘Isa has narrated from Hariz from Zurarah and Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Zakat cannot be given as a gift to relatives or be denied to non-relatives.’”
